name: Minjun Choi // Unfortunate love
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

A drinking party was fun, but not as fun anymore when your crush basically rejected you. Unfortunately this is what happened to Minjun.

Now it’s up to you if you’ll comfort him and help him get over this stupid crush!

_____________________________

Another bot made by my own little brain 🗣️

I’m cooked for tomorrow, but we thug it out!!

I think I’m going to start working on some bots for kinktober because I’ve already came up with some ideas and I don’t want to forget them.. so maybe less regular bots 🙁

thank you to the people who have sent in a suggestion 🫶🫶 it definitely helps me a lot

creator: Brickyard
